Rules.displayFormat.code: Display the currency code, such as USD 100
Rules.displayFormat.symbol: Display the currency symbol, such as $100

Rules.hierarchical-select.2: Linked selection: When all child nodes of a parent node are selected, only save the parent node ID.
Rules.hierarchical-select.3: Independent selection: Parent and child nodes are not linked and can save both the parent node ID and the child node ID simultaneously.

Rules.hyperlink_open._self: Open in the same browser tab or window.
Rules.hyperlink_open._blank: Open in a new browser tab or window.

Rules.richtext-type.nobar: No toobar displayed, a simplified user interface in rich text editing

notes: Normalized for generator and validator guidance. This is not a full runtime proof for every schema-supported type.
Use errors only for unknown type, clearly invalid primitive type, invalid enum, or required metadata known from proven baselines.
Use warnings for schema-supported but runtime-unproven types.

textarea.notes: Use for multiline text where the list field stores Text.

radio.notes: Use Rules.choices/options/items and store selected text.

time.fallback: Text/input until time field runtime is proven

identity-picker.fallback: Text/input display value unless user/person field metadata is proven

lookup.notes: Requires appid/listsetid/listid/listfield and resolved target list.
